alkylation reagent: modified with 10 mM iodoacetamide in 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate
cleavage agent: trypsinized in 10 mM ammonium bicarbonate containing trypsin
enrichment method: loaded into a heparin affinity column
fragmentation method: collision-induced dissociation (CID) of the seven most dominant ions
instrument: mass spectrometry was performed by an ion-trap mass spectrometer (Orbitrap, Thermo)
labeling: labeling by dimethylation was done in the presence of 100 mM NaCBH3
